auth.signupSub: No users yet. The first account becomes the master and controls everything.
auth.loginSub: Signup is closed. The master manages accounts from inside.
perm.title: Sandbox permissions
perm.sub: These map directly to agent_api convars. Changes apply live and persist across restarts.
users.title: Users
users.sub: Only the master can create or remove accounts. There is no public signup once the master exists.
